samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder with pipelining stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation.</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal indicating the availability of the result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">Idle state.</state>
        <state id="STAGE1">Stage 1 of the pipeline.</state>
        <state id="STAGE2">Stage 2 of the pipeline.</state>
        <state id="STAGE3">Stage 3 of the pipeline.</state>
        <state id="STAGE4">Stage 4 of the pipeline.</state>
        <state id="STAGE5">Stage 5 of the pipeline.</state>
        <state id="STAGE6">Stage 6 of the pipeline.</state>
        <state id="STAGE7">Stage 7 of the pipeline.</state>
        <state id="STAGE8">Stage 8 of the pipeline.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="r_i_en" width_description="[0:0]">Register to hold the input enable signal.</reg>
        <reg id="r_adda" width_description="[63:0]">Register to hold the first operand.</reg>
        <reg id="r_addb" width_description="[63:0]">Register to hold the second operand.</reg>
        <reg id="r_carry" width_description="[64:0]">Register to hold the carry value.</reg>
        <reg id="r_result" width_description="[64:0]">Register to hold the final result.</reg>
        <reg id="r_o_en" width_description="[0:0]">Register to hold the output enable signal.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Pipeline stage 1
        if (r_i_en == 1'b1) begin
            r_adda <= adda;
            r_addb <= addb;
            r_carry[0] <= 1'b0;
        end
        
        // Pipeline stage 2
        r_carry[1] <= r_adda[0] & r_addb[0];
        
        // Pipeline stage 3
        r_carry[2] <= (r_adda[1] & r_addb[1]) | (r_adda[1] & r_carry[1]) | (r_addb[1] & r_carry[1]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 4
        r_carry[3] <= (r_adda[2] & r_addb[2]) | (r_adda[2] & r_carry[2]) | (r_addb[2] & r_carry[2]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 5
        r_carry[4] <= (r_adda[3] & r_addb[3]) | (r_adda[3] & r_carry[3]) | (r_addb[3] & r_carry[3]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 6
        r_carry[5] <= (r_adda[4] & r_addb[4]) | (r_adda[4] & r_carry[4]) | (r_addb[4] & r_carry[4]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 7
        r_carry[6] <= (r_adda[5] & r_addb[5]) | (r_adda[5] & r_carry[5]) | (r_addb[5] & r_carry[5]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 8
        r_carry[7] <= (r_adda[6] & r_addb[6]) | (r_adda[6] & r_carry[6]) | (r_addb[6] & r_carry[6]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 9
        r_carry[8] <= (r_adda[7] & r_addb[7]) | (r_adda[7] & r_carry[7]) | (r_addb[7] & r_carry[7]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 10
        r_carry[9] <= (r_adda[8] & r_addb[8]) | (r_adda[8] & r_carry[8]) | (r_addb[8] & r_carry[8]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 11
        r_carry[10] <= (r_adda[9] & r_addb[9]) | (r_adda[9] & r_carry[9]) | (r_addb[9] & r_carry[9]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 12
        r_carry[11] <= (r_adda[10] & r_addb[10]) | (r_adda[10] & r_carry[10]) | (r_addb[10] & r_carry[10]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 13
        r_carry[12] <= (r_adda[11] & r_addb[11]) | (r_adda[11] & r_carry[11]) | (r_addb[11] & r_carry[11]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 14
        r_carry[13] <= (r_adda[12] & r_addb[12]) | (r_adda[12] & r_carry[12]) | (r_addb[12] & r_carry[12]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 15
        r_carry[14] <= (r_adda[13] & r_addb[13]) | (r_adda[13] & r_carry[13]) | (r_addb[13] & r_carry[13]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 16
        r_carry[15] <= (r_adda[14] & r_addb[14]) | (r_adda[14] & r_carry[14]) | (r_addb[14] & r_carry[14]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 17
        r_carry[16] <= (r_adda[15] & r_addb[15]) | (r_adda[15] & r_carry[15]) | (r_addb[15] & r_carry[15]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 18
        r_carry[17] <= (r_adda[16] & r_addb[16]) | (r_adda[16] & r_carry[16]) | (r_addb[16] & r_carry[16]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 19
        r_carry[18] <= (r_adda[17] & r_addb[17]) | (r_adda[17] & r_carry[17]) | (r_addb[17] & r_carry[17]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 20
        r_carry[19] <= (r_adda[18] & r_addb[18]) | (r_adda[18] & r_carry[18]) | (r_addb[18] & r_carry[18]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 21
        r_carry[20] <= (r_adda[19] & r_addb[19]) | (r_adda[19] & r_carry[19]) | (r_addb[19] & r_carry[19]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 22
        r_carry[21] <= (r_adda[20] & r_addb[20]) | (r_adda[20] & r_carry[20]) | (r_addb[20] & r_carry[20]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 23
        r_carry[22] <= (r_adda[21] & r_addb[21]) | (r_adda[21] & r_carry[21]) | (r_addb[21] & r_carry[21]);
        
        // Pipeline stage 24
        r_carry[23] <= (r_adda[22] & r_addb[22]) | (r_adda[22] & r_carry[22]) | (r_addb[22] & r_carry[22]);
        
        // Pipeline stage
